title: RNC Day 3 speakers: JD Vance, Donald Trump Jr. set to take the stage

title: What's Mike Johnson's religion? House Speaker is Southern Baptist
shortDescription: Speaker Mike Johnson and former speaker Rep. Kevin McCarthy share the same religious faith.

title: Vance, Trump backing different candidates in AZ race
shortDescription: Here's who Donald Trump and JD Vance are backing in the GOP race to replace the retiring Rep. Debbie Lesko, R-Ariz.

title: Democrats to hold off nominating President Biden virtually this month
shortDescription: Democrats won't nominate President Joe Biden as their nominee this month but still intend to virtually before Aug. 7 ahead of the DNC convention.

title: Homeland Security official to probe handling of Trump rally security
shortDescription: The inspector general will evaluate "the United States Secret Service process for securing former President Trump."

title: Trump assassination attempt prompts conspiracy theories online and off
shortDescription: Researchers say they aren't surprised to see conspiracy theories spring up after the Trump rally shooting.

title: Trump shooter had little time, left little trace of deadly plot
shortDescription: In an increasingly online world, Thomas Matthew Crooks, 20, seems to have stayed hidden while devising a plan to murder a former U.S. president.

title: Day 3 at RNC: JD Vance's big speech, top Trump allies top speaker list
shortDescription: The Day 3 schedule at the RNC includes talk of foreign policy and a speech from Donald Trump's VP pick JD Vance.

title: A hero, a firefighter, a Trump supporter. What will his death mean?
shortDescription: There are few figures as unifying in America as a firefighter. Still, Corey Comperatore is being laid to rest amid toxic, deadly political division.

title: 'Arm yourself': GOP pro-gun positions unchanged after Trump shooting
shortDescription: Gun-rights advocates and a top Trump surrogate talked about why they believe gun control is a bad idea.

title: Border security focus at RNC: Here's the real data under Trump, Biden
shortDescription: How have former President Donald J. Trump and President Joe Biden approached concerns about border security? USA TODAY has the numbers.

title: Trump, GOP play for Latino voters pays off. Hispanics explain why.
shortDescription: In 2024, the GOP is stressing everyday life issues — inflation, crime and the unfairness of an "open border."

title: Senador Rubio destaca logros de Trump para pedir un segundo mandato
shortDescription: El senador de la Florida fué considerado como unos de los principales candidatos al compañero de formula de Donald Trump.
